subject: [PATCH v5 1/6] sunrpc: add per-netns per-procedure call counts to svc_stat

2026-06-18.patch_summary: This patch adds per-network namespace (netns) call counts for each RPC procedure to the svc_stat structure in the Linux kernel's sunrpc module. The existing global call count arrays are not netns-aware, which is a problem for the upcoming netlink stats interface that requires namespace-scoped statistics. To solve this issue, the patch introduces per-netns equivalents of the global call count arrays and updates relevant code to manage these new counters. This change will enable more fine-grained monitoring and statistics collection in network namespaces.
